reviews.review_description: When I start the game, the "start" button that you're supposed to shoot in order to get going is recessed deep in the floor right in your feet. You can't shoot the start button as the bullets hit the floor. Tried holding the Meta button to reposition the start button, that does nothing. Simply unable to play the game. Too bad as it looked like it might have been cool. Had to uninstall and move on.
Cant play at all just a waste of memory
Game has lag. but this best game. :) Thanks!

reviews.review_title: I do not no it’s fun but vail is better
reviews.review_description: It’s not very fun kind of boring vail is a lot better if you like shooting games get vail it still fun you should try it and it is mixed reality which makes it better
